feature.label: ConfigLens — Configuration Intelligence
feature.description: ConfigLens brings intelligent configuration-file analysis directly into Eclipse. It parses YAML, JSON, and .env files with a streaming engine, provides breadcrumb navigation, inline CodeLens ghost-text previews, real-time secret detection via 24+ regex patterns, AI-assisted structural analysis (opt-in, Gemini Pro), and an interruptible "100MB-safe" parser that keeps the IDE responsive even for massive files.
feature.copyright: Copyright (c) 2024-2026 ConfigLens Contributors. All rights reserved. This program and the accompanying materials are made available under the terms of the Eclipse Public License v2.0.
